Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Class RandomFleetPlacer

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
public final class RandomFleetPlacer extends Object
Populates a Board with a complete, valid fleet using a random placement algorithm.

Ships are placed one type at a time, in fleet-count order as defined by ShipType. For each ship, the placer draws a random Orientation and a random Coordinate head position and delegates validation entirely to Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation). If that call raises InvalidPlacementException (out-of-bounds or adjacency/overlap conflict) the attempt is simply retried until a valid position is found.

This class follows the Builder pattern in spirit: it constructs (fills) a complex object step by step, keeping the construction logic separate from the Board class itself (Single Responsibility). It is intentionally stateless between calls — each place(Board) invocation operates independently.

The placement loop is guaranteed to terminate in practice because a standard 10×10 Battleship fleet always fits on a 10×10 grid with the enforced spacing rules. A safety counter prevents infinite loops during unit testing or if future rule changes make the fleet too large.

    Field
    Description
    private static final int
    MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_SHIP
    Maximum placement attempts per individual ship before giving up.
    private final Random
    random
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RandomFleetPlacer()
    Creates a placer with an internally managed Random source.
    RandomFleetPlacer(Random random)
    Creates a placer with the given Random source, useful for seeding deterministic tests.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    place(Board board)
    Places one ship of every type in the fleet onto board, choosing random orientations and positions while respecting all of Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation)'s validation rules.
    private void
    placeOneShip(Board board, ShipType type)
    Attempts to place a single ship of type on board by trying random positions until Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) accepts one.

    randomCoordinate()
     
    private Orientation
    randomOrientation()

      Maximum placement attempts per individual ship before giving up.

  • Constructor Details

    • RandomFleetPlacer

      public RandomFleetPlacer()
      Creates a placer with an internally managed Random source.

    • RandomFleetPlacer

      public RandomFleetPlacer(Random random)
      Creates a placer with the given Random source, useful for seeding deterministic tests.
      Parameters:
      random - The random number generator to use.

  • Method Details

    • place

      public void place(Board board)
      Places one ship of every type in the fleet onto board, choosing random orientations and positions while respecting all of Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation)'s validation rules.
      Parameters:
      board - The board to populate. Must be empty (no prior ships).
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the maximum attempt count is exceeded for any single ship, indicating a configuration that cannot be satisfied.

    • placeOneShip

      private void placeOneShip(Board board, ShipType type)
      Attempts to place a single ship of type on board by trying random positions until Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) accepts one.
      Parameters:
      board - The board to place the ship on.
      type - The ship type to place.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_SHIP is exceeded without finding a valid placement.

    • randomOrientation

      private Orientation randomOrientation()
      Returns:
      A uniformly random Orientation.

    • randomCoordinate

      private Coordinate randomCoordinate()
      Returns:
      A uniformly random Coordinate anywhere on the board.
